items.label: Essay 01 — Harbor District, 2024–2026
items.title: The Night Shift
items.description: Two years documenting the dockworkers, night nurses, and bakers who keep a port town running after dark — a portrait of labor most of the city never sees.

items.label: Essay 02 — River Road, 2025
items.title: What the Water Left
items.description: In the weeks after the flooding along River Road, families sorted through what could be saved. This essay follows three households through the slow work of rebuilding.

items.label: Essay 03 — Elm Street, 2025
items.title: Last Bell
items.description: A year inside a rural school in its final term before closure — the last graduating class, the empty hallways, and what a town loses when its school shuts its doors.
